name: Mimi's Rock Corp.
summary: Mimi's Rock Corp. operates as an online dietary supplement and wellness company that markets and sells its products under the Dr. Tobias, All Natural Advice, and Maritime Naturals brand names. Its products include colon 14-day cleanse and omega 3 fish oil; adult multivitamin; deep immune probiotics and prebiotics; vitamin D3; turmeric curcumin; all-in-one dog chews; and skin and beauty care products. The company operates in the United States, Canada, and Europe. The company is headquartered in Oakville, Canada.
